report.summary: Community growth cycle v37 (Mar 16): Calendar extended to Jun 8 with 3 content pillars — Fair Token Launches playbook (lockdrops, LBPs, lottery, airdrop-first), peaq DePIN Robotics deep-dive (machine economy L1, 50+ DePIN projects, Machine DeFi, $2.2T TAM), and degen0x 482-page milestone celebration. Weekly newsletter drafted for Thu Jun 5 + DePIN sector poll (Fri Jun 6). Two social cards created: social-fair-token-launches.svg (green/purple/amber theme, 4 launch model cards, distribution flow) and social-peaq-depin-robotics.svg (teal/lime DePIN theme, 3 feature cards, machine economy flow).

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Mon Jun 2 — Twitter thread (5 posts): Fair Token Launches — lockdrops, LBPs, lottery, airdrop-first; Hyperliquid $1.6B+ as real example; fair distribution → sustainable price thesis; CTA to /learn/fair-token-launches-guide-2026

Tue Jun 3 — Twitter thread (5 posts): peaq DePIN Robotics — machine economy L1, 50+ DePIN projects, Machine IDs, Machine DeFi, Polkadot SDK, $2.2T TAM by 2030; CTA to /learn/peaq-depin-robotics-guide-2026 + /learn/ai-depin-crypto-guide
Wed Jun 4 — Twitter standalone: degen0x milestone — 482 pages live, 90+ tools, 100+ guides, 8 languages, zero affiliate bias; community input request for next page scaffolding cycle

Thu Jun 5 — Full weekly newsletter: Fair launch lead story, peaq DePIN deep-dive, last week's poll results, 482-page milestone, Tool of the Week (/tools/market-heatmap), tease Hyperliquid trading guide + FOMC impact guide
Fri Jun 6 — Twitter poll: 'Most important DePIN sector to watch in 2026?' (Wireless/Helium, Compute/Render, Robotics/peaq, Mapping/Hivemapper)
Sat Jun 7 — Weekend wrap tweet: Fair launches + peaq DePIN + milestone recap; teases Hyperliquid guide + FOMC guide for next week

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: social-fair-token-launches.svg — 1200x630 social card: dark purple/green/amber theme; 'TOKEN LAUNCHES · 2026' badge; 'Fair Token Launches — The Anti-Rug Playbook' headline; 4 launch model cards (Lockdrop green border, Lottery purple border, LBP amber border, Airdrop-First cyan border); distribution flow diagram (Fair Distribution → Aligned Holders → Sustainable Price → Organic Growth); 4 stat panels (Hyperliquid $1.6B+, 0 Insiders, 2026 Meta, Day 1 Owners); CTA bar linking /learn/fair-token-launches-guide-2026. Saved to /public/social-fair-token-launches.svg

social-peaq-depin-robotics.svg — 1200x630 social card: dark teal/lime DePIN theme; 'DePIN · MACHINE ECONOMY · 2026' badge; 'peaq — The L1 Where Machines Earn Crypto' headline; 3 feature cards (Machine IDs cyan border, Machine DeFi lime border, 50+ DePIN Projects amber border); machine economy flow (IoT Devices → peaq L1 → Machine DeFi → Crypto Rewards → You Earn); 4 stat panels ($2.2T TAM, 50+ Projects, Interoperable, $0.001/tx); dual CTA linking /learn/peaq-depin-robotics-guide-2026 + /learn/ai-depin-crypto-guide. Saved to /public/social-peaq-depin-robotics.svg

sections.title: Analytics Context
items: Calendar coverage: v37 fills Jun 2 – Jun 8. Combined with v17–v36, full social calendar now spans Mar 16 – Jun 8 (12+ weeks of content queued).
Fair token launches and peaq DePIN robotics were published today (Day 49c). Both are the last pages from the original publish queue.
Publish queue now has only 2 pages remaining: /learn/hyperliquid-trading-guide and /learn/fomc-fed-rate-crypto-guide. Queue nearly exhausted — new page scaffolding cycle needed.
482 pages now published. The platform milestone is a strong community engagement hook (Wed Jun 4 post).
Fair launches thread leverages Hyperliquid's $1.6B airdrop as proof point — connects to upcoming Hyperliquid trading guide for cross-promotion.
peaq DePIN guide fills the robotics/IoT gap in our DePIN coverage, complementing existing /learn/ai-depin-crypto-guide.
DePIN sector poll (Fri) provides data for prioritizing next DePIN content — wireless vs compute vs robotics vs mapping.
Milestone post (Wed) doubles as community input funnel for next page scaffolding cycle.
No outstanding community feedback, bug reports, or DMs requiring response this cycle.
Social drafts saved to /reports/community-drafts/2026-03-16-social-drafts-v37.md
Fair launches social card saved to /public/social-fair-token-launches.svg
peaq DePIN social card saved to /public/social-peaq-depin-robotics.svg
